name: Hybrid privacy-aware semantic search: SVD-truncated document geometry and CKKS-encrypted query reranking under a restricted threat model

description: arXiv:2606.26373v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Semantic search creates an asymmetric disclosure problem: query embeddings may reveal user intent, while returning exact provider vectors distributes reusable representations.
